raw_consumer_statement: The citi bank started calling I tried explaining to them that I did not purchase what they said I did they agreed to take it off my credit because they have impacted my credit very bad and this has made me very upset. Than they started giving me the run around having me to hold on and even telling me they will give me my money back I waited now from XXXX XXXXto XXXX  they was charging me for a product I didnt agreed on they have refused to take it off my 3 credits and I need this off my credit even the credit agreed with them even after I explained everything to them I said even if they do not refund me for their mistake please reach out to the credit report and take this {$9.00} dollars off they refuse too so if you look at my credit this is what is hurting my score.
